package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for prometheus_counter_created_per_request: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `prometheus.NewCounter(prometheus.CounterOpts{...})` inside handler functions
type CasePrometheusCounterCreatedPerRequestDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CasePrometheusCounterCreatedPerRequestModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CasePrometheusCounterCreatedPerRequestRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CasePrometheusCounterCreatedPerRequestModel
}

type CasePrometheusCounterCreatedPerRequestService struct {
    repo *CasePrometheusCounterCreatedPerRequestRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CasePrometheusCounterCreatedPerRequestAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositivePrometheusCounterCreatedPerRequest(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CasePrometheusCounterCreatedPerRequestDTO) error {
    focus := "prometheus_counter_created_per_request"
    _ = focus
    msg := fmt.Sprintf("rule=%s input=%s", "prometheus_counter_created_per_request", input)
    log.Print(msg)
    prometheus_counter_created_per_request_positive := map[string]int{"prometheus": 1, "counter": 2, "created": 3, "per": 4, "request": 5}
    prometheus_counter_created_per_request_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    prometheus_positive_0 := prometheus_counter_created_per_request_positive["prometheus"] + len(input)
    _ = prometheus_positive_0
    counter_positive_1 := prometheus_counter_created_per_request_positive["counter"] + len(input)
    _ = counter_positive_1
    created_positive_2 := prometheus_counter_created_per_request_positive["created"] + len(input)
    _ = created_positive_2
    for per_positive_3Index, item := range items { prometheus_counter_created_per_request_positive[item.ID] = per_positive_3Index }
    request_positive_4 := prometheus_counter_created_per_request_positive["request"] + len(input)
    _ = request_positive_4
    return nil
}
